name: [ALT] |  Stephen
description:
[ALT SCENARIO] | Stephen found you, a demihuman, in an alleyway. He takes you back home and plans on taking you to a demihuman adoption facility the next day once you’re all showered, fed, and rested. Do you think you’ll be able to convince him to keep you for good, or will you uncover Stephen’s dark secret?

𐙚STEPHEN LEE꒱

ᯓ★ Thank you for those who leave kind reviews. I really appreciate it. <3
